prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should identify abnormal intervals (if any), quantify severity or count of anomalies, and provide a concise interpretation of persistence.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] none — Filter the list of sensor IDs to include only winding temperature sensors. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalous sensor readings using a rolling z-score method for the past 7 days. (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [iot] none — Summarize any persistent abnormal periods. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [iot] none — Determine the desired threshold for anomaly detection.
  Step 7: [iot] none — Prioritize specific time intervals within the past 7 days.

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-019",
      "task": "List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.",
      "prior_step_results": "none"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "continue",
    "verifier_reason": "Current step result does not suggest a change in the remaining plan.",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "",
    "retries_used": 0
  },
  {

    "task": "List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.",

    "tool_args": {

      }
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results of the anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days, there were no persistent abnormal periods detected. The anomaly detection using a rolling z-score method did not identify any anomalies, resulting in an anomaly count of 0 and an anomaly rate of 0.0%.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,

    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Review and optimize the agent's step sequence to eliminate redundant or unnecessary steps."
}
